prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2023 年最低位次约 9937 名，2024 年降至约 10959 名（后移约 1022 名），2025 年回升至约 10385 名（前移约 574 名），近三年波动幅度约 1000 名，2025 年基准约 10385 名；该校在新疆理科招生计划 2023 年 22 人、2024 年 22 人、2025 年增至 24 人，2026 年进一步扩至 26 人，较 2025 年扩招约 8.3%，招生名额增加使竞争略有缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名 2026 年约第 86 名，近年排名持续上升（2021 年 94→2026 年 86），学校综合实力和认可度稳步提升；该校在声誉监测中未出现明显负面舆情；抖音综合热度排名第 25 位（较热），短视频曝光量较高，反映考生关注度处于中等偏上水平，未见投档断档记录。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026 年招生专业中电子信息工程、电气工程及其自动化属高热推荐专业，竞争热度高；车辆工程属明显劝退，土木工程属分化观望，环境工程和化学工程与工艺属明显劝退，冷热专业 并存使整体位次趋于稳定。新疆 2025 年理科考生约 5.25 万人，2026 年总考生约 23.8 万人（按历史理科占比约 68.6% 估算理科约 16.3 万人），考生规模大幅增加，竞争显著加剧。；广西大学位于广西南宁，距新疆较远，跨省报考存在地域偏好影响；该校在新疆招 生计划较小（约 24-26 人），占比较低，地域因素对位次影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 10385 名、2026 年扩招约 8.3%（按供需弹性计算位次后移至约 10904 名）、新疆考生规模大幅增加（竞争加剧推动位次前移）、学校排名持续上升（吸引力增强）以及冷热专业并存的综合影响，预计 2026 年最低录取位次约 10754 名，较 2025 年小幅后移约 369 名；波动区间 10254-11254 名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间（10254-11254 名）内，建议以二档车辆工程为主攻方向，一档电子信息工程和电气工程及其自动化可冲刺报考，三档土木工程、环境工程、化学工程与工艺作为保底选择。位次明显优于区间下 限（10254 名以内）可重点冲刺一档热门专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2023, the lowest ranking was approximately 9937, dropping to about 10959 in 2024 (a backward shift of about 1022 places), and recovering to about 10385 in 2025 (a forward shift of about 574 places). The fluctuation range over the past three years is about 1000 places, with a baseline of about 10385 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan for science students in Xinjiang was 22 in 2023, 22 in 2024, increased to 24 in 2025, and further expanded to 26 in 2026, an increase of about 8.3% compared to 2025. The increase in enrollment slots slightly eases competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it ranks approximately 86th, with a continuous upward trend in recent years (from 94th in 2021 to 86th in 2026). The university's comprehensive strength and recognition are steadily improving. No significant negative public opinion has been detected in reputation monitoring. It ranks 25th in comprehensive Douyin popularity (relatively hot), with high short video exposure, reflecting a moderately high level of candidate attention, and no records of enrollment gaps.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In the 2026 enrollment majors, Electronic Information Engineering and Electrical Engineering and Automation are highly popular recommended majors with high competition. Vehicle Engineering is clearly discouraged, Civil Engineering is in a state of divergence and wait-and-see, Environmental Engineering and Chemical Engineering and Technology are clearly discouraged. The coexistence of hot and cold majors stabilizes the overall ranking. In 2025, there were about 52,500 science candidates in Xinjiang, and in 2026, the total number of candidates is about 238,000 (with an estimated science count of about 163,000 based on a historical science proportion of about 68.6%). The significant increase in candidate numbers intensifies competition. Guangxi University is located in Nanning, Guangxi, far from Xinjiang, so cross-province applications are influenced by regional preferences. The university's enrollment plan in Xinjiang is small (about 24-26 people), with a low proportion, so regional factors have a limited impact on rankings.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 10385, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 8.3% (with the ranking shifting backward to about 10904 based on supply-demand elasticity), the significant increase in the number of candidates in Xinjiang (intensifying competition, pushing the ranking forward), the continuous rise in the university's ranking (increasing attractiveness), and the coexistence of hot and cold majors, it is predicted that the lowest admission ranking in 2026 will be about 10754, a slight backward shift of about 369 places compared to 2025. The fluctuation range is 10254-11254.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:

- Electrical Engineering and Automation
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Civil Engineering
- Environmental Engineering
- Chemical Engineering and Technology
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range (10254-11254), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Vehicle Engineering as the main direction, with Tier 1 Electronic Information Engineering and Electrical Engineering and Automation as reach options, and Tier 3 Civil Engineering, Environmental Engineering, and Chemical Engineering and Technology as safety choices. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 10254), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 popular majors.
